title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is deploying AI-assisted development to accelerate software engineering velocity, with teams completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster and projecting 40% more capabilities delivery in 2026. The case suggests AI tools enable expanded development capacity beyond pure efficiency gains.
